The coaster was designed by Ing.-Büro Stengel GmbH and Schwarzkopf, with the manufacturing and construction handled by Sansei Technologies.

fullText:
Shuttle Loop (Japanese: シャトルループ) was a steel launched shuttle roller coaster previously located at Yokohama Dreamland in Totsuka, Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan. The coaster was designed by Ing.-Büro Stengel GmbH and Schwarzkopf, with the manufacturing and construction handled by Sansei Technologies.

The vertical loop had a diameter of.

Mint track and white supports.




 * A newspaper clipping about the ride's opening
